data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Warranty tracking on parts and labor', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is adequately covered. While the linked use case mentions warranty details, there is no concrete evidence of an API read or persisted state check that explicitly demonstrates the tracking of warranties for parts and labor. This indicates a gap in the requirement's fulfillment, as the evidence does not provide the necessary confirmation of warranty tracking functionality.
gaps: No evidence of warranty tracking functionality for parts and labor.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Check warranty tracking implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that the system tracks warranties for both parts and labor.
